fields.Identifying_Data_Chief_Complaint: 44-year-old African American male with schizophrenia brought by police after threatening behavior.
fields.Subjective: Patient brought in handcuffs by police after threatening neighbors with knife believing they were 'demons sent to destroy him.' Brother provides collateral that he completely stopped quetiapine 11 weeks ago claiming it was 'satanic poison.' Since discontinuation, complete psychotic breakdown. Constant hallucinations - hearing demon voices commanding him to 'destroy evil,' seeing demonic figures everywhere. Elaborate religious delusions about apocalypse and his role as warrior. Performing bizarre rituals, destroyed furniture to 'purge demons.' No sleep for weeks per neighbor observations - yelling and praying all hours. Refusing all food and water believing contaminated by demons, severe weight loss estimated 40+ lbs, appears near death. Lost warehouse job 9 weeks ago after bizarre behavior. Gave away all possessions preparing for 'final battle.' Apartment covered in religious symbols drawn in blood. Brother unable to reach him for month. Patient extremely agitated, threatening, responding to hallucinations, attacking staff believing they're demons. No insight or cooperation. Safety: high violence risk, recent knife threat, ongoing command hallucinations to harm 'demons,' unable to distinguish reality. (Evaluated by Dr. David Chen, ED Physician)

Mental_Status_Examination.Appearance: Severely emaciated, appearing near death, disheveled, malodorous, agitated, restrained
Mental_Status_Examination.Speech: Loud, disorganized, religious and delusional content, threatening
Mental_Status_Examination.Thought_Content: Severe religious and paranoid delusions, command hallucinations to harm others, no reality testing

Behavioral_Health_Checkup.C_SSRS: Denies SI; extreme violence risk to others

fields.Current_Medications: Quetiapine 400 mg PO qHS (stopped 11 weeks ago)

Laboratory_Data.Recent_Lab_Results: Life-threatening dehydration and starvation; AKI with creatinine 3.2; severe electrolyte abnormalities; albumin 2.0.

fields.Diagnostic_Impression: Schizophrenia with severe psychotic crisis and life-threatening medical emergency after medication discontinuation; danger to others; grave disability.
fields.Psychosocial_Context: Recently unemployed; threatening violence; criminal charges pending; near-death from starvation/dehydration.
Assessment_and_Plan: Life-threatening crisis after stopping quetiapine 11 weeks ago.
Severe psychosis with violence, command hallucinations, knife threat.
Near-death from starvation and dehydration - medical emergency.
Meets criteria for involuntary hospitalization - danger to others and grave disability.
Immediate transfer to medical psychiatry ICU.
Aggressive IV hydration and nutritional support life-saving.
IM antipsychotic needed given aggression and inability to take PO.
May need ECT if medication ineffective.
Criminal charges pending - forensic coordination needed.
fields.Author: Note written by Dr. David Chen, ED Physician — General Hospital Emergency Department, 200 Emergency Lane, San Francisco, CA 94102, Phone: (555) 883-9943, Fax: (555) 883-9944
